mapper.select: select to_char(t.DEAL_TIME, 'yyyy-mm-dd') deal_time from dyn_receive_file t where t.id=#{id}

SELECT q.* FROM ( SELECT cast(t.DBID_ as varchar2(50)) DBID_, t.DBVERSION_, t.EXECUTION_, t.OUTCOME_, t.ASSIGNEE_, t.PRIORITY_, t.STATE_, t.CREATE_, to_char(t.CREATE_,'yyyy-MM-dd hh24:mi:ss') as SEND_TIME, t.END_, t.DURATION_, t.NEXTIDX_, t.SUPERTASK_, t.TASK_ORDER_, t.OPEN_, t.TAKE_STATE_, t.PROCINST_, t.SUSPHISTSTATE_, t.TASK_TYPE_, cast(t.TASK_B_ID_ as varchar2(50)) TASK_B_ID_, t.TASK_TITLE_, t.TASK_SENDUSER_, t.TASK_SENDDEPT_, t.FORM_, t.PROCESS_DEF_NAME_, t.TASK_FINISHED_, t.TASK_STATE_, t.TASK_NAME_, t.HISACTINST_, t.WORKHAND_TYPE_, t.WORKHAND_USER_, u.NAME WORKHAND_USER_NAME, t.APP_ID_, t.IS_READTODO_, t.MOBILE_APPROVAL_, t.FORM_URL_MOBILE_, t.FORM_CODE_, t.ASSIGNEE_DEPT_, t.REASONABLE_FINISH_TIME_, t.WARNING_FINISH_TIME_, t.DESCR_, 'BPM' TASK_SOURCE, null SECRET_LEVEL FROM BPM_HIST_TASK_V t left join sys_user u on t.WORKHAND_USER_=u.id where t.TASK_STATE_ = '1' and t.ASSIGNEE_ = #{userId} and t.TASK_FINISHED_ = '0'
and t.CREATE_ > to_date(#{startTime},'yyyy-MM-dd hh24:mi:ss')
and t.CREATE_ < to_date(#{endTime},'yyyy-MM-dd hh24:mi:ss')
and t.TASK_TITLE_ like concat(concat('%',#{title}),'%')
UNION ALL SELECT bt.ID DBID_, 0 DBVERSION_, null EXECUTION_, null OUTCOME_, bt.RECEIVER_ID ASSIGNEE_, to_number(nvl(bt.PRIORITY,'1')) PRIORITY_, null STATE_, nvl(bt.SEND_TIME, cast(bt.CREATION_DATE as timestamp)) CREATE_, to_char(nvl(bt.SEND_TIME, cast(bt.CREATION_DATE as timestamp)),'yyyy-MM-dd hh24:mi:ss') as SEND_TIME, null END_, null DURATION_, null NEXTIDX_, null SUPERTASK_, null TASK_ORDER_, null OPEN_, null TAKE_STATE_, null PROCINST_, null SUSPHISTSTATE_, '0' TASK_TYPE_, bt.BUSINESS_ID TASK_B_ID_, bt.TITLE TASK_TITLE_, bt.SEND_USER_NAME TASK_SENDUSER_, null TASK_SENDDEPT_, bt.TARGET_URL FORM_, bt.TASK_TYPE PROCESS_DEF_NAME_, '0' TASK_FINISHED_, '1' TASK_STATE_, bt.TITLE TASK_NAME_, null HISACTINST_, null WORKHAND_TYPE_, null WORKHAND_USER_, null WORKHAND_USER_NAME, 'PB' APP_ID_, null IS_READTODO_, null MOBILE_APPROVAL_, null FORM_URL_MOBILE_, null FORM_CODE_, null ASSIGNEE_DEPT_, null REASONABLE_FINISH_TIME_, null WARNING_FINISH_TIME_, bt.TASK_DESC DESCR_, 'BUSINESS' TASK_SOURCE, null SECRET_LEVEL FROM PB_PORTAL_BUSINESS_TODO bt where bt.TODO_STATUS = 'ACTIVE' and bt.RECEIVER_ID = #{userId}
and nvl(bt.SEND_TIME, cast(bt.CREATION_DATE as timestamp)) > to_timestamp(#{startTime},'yyyy-MM-dd hh24:mi:ss')
and nvl(bt.SEND_TIME, cast(bt.CREATION_DATE as timestamp)) < to_timestamp(#{endTime},'yyyy-MM-dd hh24:mi:ss')
and bt.TITLE like concat(concat('%',#{title}),'%')
) q order by q.PRIORITY_ desc, q.CREATE_ desc
